description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is a smooth, dark surface with a prominent triple-lens camera array in the top left corner and a subtle, centered Apple logo. The sides are thin and appear to be made of metal or a durable composite, with no visible buttons or ports in the provided views. The device has a glossy finish, giving it a premium and reflective appearance. Its overall design is minimalist and sophisticated, typical of high-end mobile phones.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large display, triple rear cameras, and a glossy dark finish. The design is minimalist with a prominent Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful abstract wallpaper and a small notch at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slim thickness and slightly protruding camera bump.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the triple camera array in the top left corner and a centered Apple logo on a smooth, dark surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the slimness and the camera bump's extension.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, subtle and reflective against the dark surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, white, and purple-pink shapes. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern with a slight camera bump.
attribute_button_layout: None visible in the provided views.
